changelog: FIXED: stale $40 amount shown on cached orders — the app now always re-fetches the current server amount (so the testing $5 price actually appears).
FIXED: long recipient email no longer wraps onto two lines — auto-shrinks until it fits the card on one line, on any device.
FIXED: header (HushTV Canada + subtitle) is now properly centered on screen — lock icon + title on top row, subtitle centered below.
